parameters.jsCode:
const articles = $json.articles;
const articleCount = $json.articleCount;

let articlesText = '';
articles.forEach((article, i) => {
  articlesText += `\n${i + 1}. [${article.feedName}] ${article.title}\nURL: ${article.link}\nExtrait: ${article.content}\n`;
});

const prompt = `### CONTEXT
You are a Senior Swift Architect specialized in tech intelligence and the Swift 6 migration (Strict Concurrency). You are processing a feed of technical articles and Swift Evolution discussions.

### OBJECTIVE
Filter, analyze, and summarize the provided articles.
Target content: Swift 6 migration, Strict Concurrency, Sendability, Actor isolation, and Swift Evolution Proposals (SE-xxxx).

INPUT DATA:
${articlesText}

### STYLE & TONE
Technical, concise, and professional. Use senior-level terminology. Do NOT translate Swift keywords (e.g., keep "Sendable", "Data race", "MainActor", "Task Group").

### AUDIENCE
iOS Developers migrating from Swift 5 to Swift 6.

### RESPONSE RULES & FORMATTING
1. LANGUAGE: Summarize in the original language of the source (French if source is FR, English if EN, Japanese if JP).
2. NO MARKDOWN: Do not use **, #, or _. Use plain text and emojis only.
3. SPACING: Add a double line break between each article for human readability.
4. RELEVANCE: If no article matches the topics, reply only with: AUCUN.
5. SWIFT PROPOSALS: If an article discusses a specific proposal, prefix the title with [SE-XXXX].

### RESPONSE STRUCTURE PER ARTICLE
📦 [CATEGORY NAME]

Title: [SE-XXXX if applicable] [Original Title]
Summary: [2-3 dense technical sentences in the source's language]
Action: [Practical step for a developer during migration]
Swift Version: [6.0 / 6.1 / 6.2 / Future]
Link: [URL]

---

### TOPICS TO FILTER (STRICT)
- Strict Concurrency, Sendable, @Sendable, sending (SE-0430).
- Actor isolation, Global Actors, MainActor, SE-0466, SE-0461.
- Region-based isolation (SE-0414), Data race safety.
- Task, TaskGroup, Custom Executors, Mutex (SE-0433).
- Ownership, ~Copyable, Typed throws (SE-0413), Swift Testing.
- Any Swift Evolution Proposal (SE-xxxx).`;

return [{ json: { prompt, articleCount } }];
